name: atl
description: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

interface.shortDescription: Confluence and Jira workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use the atl CLI from Codex to mirror Confluence pages and Jira issues to local files, search them, edit native formats where supported, and push deliberate changes under version and safety checks.
defaultPrompt: Use atl to search Confluence and Jira for context.
Set up atl for Confluence and Jira access.
Use atl to update a Confluence page safely.
